response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio phonetically matches the provided lyrics for Ninomae Ina'nis's song 'VIOLET', though the video begins with the final chorus of another song (likely 'Stellar Stellar') before transitioning into 'VIOLET' and ending with Ina'nis's spoken MC segment. 2. JSON Usage: The reference JSON for 'VIOLET' was used for the main performance, while the opening lines and closing speech were transcribed manually. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are precisely anchored to vocal onsets. Overlapping transitions between song segments and the final speech are handled with instantaneous transitions to maintain synchronization.

subtitles.original: 連れ出す貴船よ
subtitles.english: The ship that carries me away,

subtitles.original: 出航して
subtitles.english: Set sail!

subtitles.original: 私のもの
subtitles.english: Everything is mine,

subtitles.original: また私のもの
subtitles.english: Once again, it's all mine.

subtitles.original: 数多の薔薇 打ち放てたとしても
subtitles.english: Even if countless roses were set free,

subtitles.original: 枯れない魂まで
subtitles.english: Until it reaches my undying soul.

subtitles.original: 魔の友情 永遠の美貌
subtitles.english: Devil's friendship, eternal beauty.

subtitles.original: そんな幻影を歌っていたいでしょう
subtitles.english: I'd want to keep singing of such illusions.

subtitles.original: 手放して翼ついた
subtitles.english: Letting go, wings have grown.

subtitles.original: さあ行こう 夜明けに舵を向けて
subtitles.english: Come, let's go! Steer towards the dawn.

subtitles.original: 曰くをも焼き落とした船
subtitles.english: A ship that burned away even its history,

subtitles.original: 希望だけ残していく 神は乗らない
subtitles.english: Leaving only hope behind, no gods aboard.

subtitles.original: 空へ
subtitles.english: To the sky!

subtitles.original: 風に吹かれて 誰も気付かぬよう
subtitles.english: Blown by the wind, so that no one notices,

subtitles.original: 区別がつかない モノクロの世界
subtitles.english: I can't tell them apart in this monochrome world.

subtitles.original: 色を足しても 何も見えなくて
subtitles.english: Even if I add color, I can see nothing,

subtitles.original: まるで私は 息を止めていた
subtitles.english: It's as if I had been holding my breath.

subtitles.original: もういいよ 遠くても
subtitles.english: It's alright now, even if it's far,

subtitles.original: 叶えたい 私は
subtitles.english: I want to make it come true.

subtitles.original: この世界をも 抱きしめていたいのに
subtitles.english: Even though I want to embrace this whole world...

subtitles.original: 夢のキャンバスに
subtitles.english: On the canvas of dreams,

subtitles.original: 描き続ける意味は
subtitles.english: The meaning of continuing to paint

subtitles.original: この胸に 輝いている
subtitles.english: is shining within this heart of mine.

subtitles.original: Story
subtitles.english: Story

subtitles.original: 溢れることに 意味などないけれど
subtitles.english: There's no meaning in things overflowing, but

subtitles.original: 拾い集めた 欠片失うの
subtitles.english: I'm losing the fragments I've gathered up.

subtitles.original: そして夜は その冷たさを
subtitles.english: And then the night, with its coldness,

subtitles.original: 溶かして手を伸ばした
subtitles.english: thawed as I reached out my hand.

subtitles.original: もういいよ 遠くても
subtitles.english: It's alright now, even if it's far,

subtitles.original: 届けたい 私は
subtitles.english: I want it to reach you.

subtitles.original: 不器用でも 抱きしめていたいのに
subtitles.english: Even if I'm clumsy, I want to embrace you...

subtitles.original: 夢のキャンバスに
subtitles.english: On the canvas of dreams,

subtitles.original: 心込めるのは
subtitles.english: The reason I put my heart into it

subtitles.original: この空に 描き出していく
subtitles.english: is to paint it out into this sky.

subtitles.original: Story
subtitles.english: Story

subtitles.original: そして夜は その冷たさを
subtitles.english: And then the night, with its coldness,

subtitles.original: 溶かして手を伸ばした
subtitles.english: thawed as I reached out my hand.

subtitles.original: もういいの 遠くても
subtitles.english: It's alright now, even if it's far,

subtitles.original: 叶えたい 私の
subtitles.english: I want it to come true, my

subtitles.original: この世界を 言葉で包んだ
subtitles.english: I've wrapped this world in words.

subtitles.original: 夢のキャンバスに
subtitles.english: On the canvas of dreams,

subtitles.original: 色を足していく
subtitles.english: I'll keep adding colors.

subtitles.original: この胸に 今輝いて
subtitles.english: Now, shining within this heart...

subtitles.original: 強くなくてもいい
subtitles.english: It's okay not to be strong,

subtitles.original: 壊れかけてもいい
subtitles.english: it's okay to be breaking.

subtitles.original: この心は 大空に羽ばたいて
subtitles.english: This heart will flap its wings into the vast sky.

subtitles.original: 響くように
subtitles.english: So that it resonates,

subtitles.original: 塗り替えてゆく 彩と
subtitles.english: I'll repaint it all with colors.

subtitles.original: Woo! Hello everyone!
subtitles.english: Woo! Hello everyone!

subtitles.original: It is Day 2 of "Drawn to Dawn"!
subtitles.english: It is Day 2 of "Drawn to Dawn"!

subtitles.original: Yes, yes, welcome to Day 2 of Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis's first concert, "Drawn to Dawn"!
subtitles.english: Yes, yes, welcome to Day 2 of Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis's first concert, "Drawn to Dawn"!
